name: meridian-cockpit
description: Electron app shell for the Meridian cockpit UI.
author: AesopScott

scripts.proof:cockpit: python -m pytest tests/test_bifrost_cockpit.py tests/test_bifrost_preview.py -q && npm audit --audit-level=high
scripts.proof:v3: node --test tests/electron_main.test.js tests/close_meridian_for_build.test.js && python -m pytest tests/test_bifrost_cockpit.py tests/test_bifrost_preview.py tests/test_release_readiness.py -q && node scripts/meridian-model-bridge.js --self-test && npm run build:win
